failedAssertions.reason: BLOCKED: API does not expose ultraPlanTuning/groundedSearchTuning resolved values in /runs/{runId} status. Cannot verify browser_only uplift defaults were applied. Routing behavior confirms some agentic defaults are active (grounded_web ran with multi-query), but explicit field-level config evidence is unavailable.
failedAssertions.blockingIssue: API surface gap: resolved tuning config not exposed in status response

failedAssertions.reason: BLOCKED: Cannot verify explicit overrides were preserved because status response does not expose ultraPlanTuning values. Requests accepted (202) but no way to confirm values were applied vs. coerced.
failedAssertions.blockingIssue: API surface gap: resolved tuning config not exposed in status response

failedAssertions.reason: BLOCKED: Cannot verify isolated flag effects because status response does not expose ultraPlanTuning values. Requests accepted but no config evidence available to confirm flags were set independently.
failedAssertions.blockingIssue: API surface gap: resolved tuning config not exposed in status response

failedAssertions.reason: FAIL: Malformed ultraPlanTuning payloads (non-boolean string 'not-a-boolean', number 123, unknown keys) are silently accepted with HTTP 202 and runIds created. Should return 400 with explicit field-level errors. Validation logic in parseWebhookRequest() exists but is NOT enforced for ultraPlanTuning fields.
failedAssertions.blockingIssue: Validation not enforced: non-boolean and unknown ultraPlanTuning fields accepted instead of rejected

failedAssertions.reason: BLOCKED: Cannot verify preset isolation because status response does not expose groundedSearchTuning values. Routing behavior is correct (ats_only excludes grounded_web), but tuning value evidence (legacy vs. browser_only uplift) is unavailable.
failedAssertions.blockingIssue: API surface gap: resolved tuning config not exposed in status response

systemicIssues.description: API does not expose resolved tuning configuration (ultraPlanTuning, groundedSearchTuning) in /runs/{runId} status response
systemicIssues.impact: VAL-API-001, VAL-API-002, VAL-API-003, VAL-API-005 cannot be verified without explicit resolved-config evidence
systemicIssues.suggestedFix: Add ultraPlanTuning and groundedSearchTuning (or a resolvedConfig object) to the /runs/{runId} status response payload so validators and consumers can verify what config was actually applied

systemicIssues.description: Malformed ultraPlanTuning fields are silently accepted instead of returning 400
systemicIssues.impact: VAL-API-004 fails: non-boolean values (string 'not-a-boolean', number 123) and unknown flag keys are accepted with 202 and runIds created
systemicIssues.suggestedFix: Enforce the validation logic already present in parseWebhookRequest() for ultraPlanTuning fields at runtime, or add explicit type-checking and unknown-key rejection
